title: openEHR RPS-Dual Bulk Operation Configuration
description: Operational settings for bulk data transformation and migration. Not visible in portal.

role.description: primary: allocates new codes; secondary: read-only, uses existing codes

source.description: Source database connection for bulk ingestion

target.description: Target database connection for bulk output

batch_size.description: Documents per batch during bulk operations

patient_limit.description: Maximum number of patients to process (for testing)

reset_used_flags.description: Reset 'used' flags on codes before processing

codes_refresh_interval.description: Seconds between code dictionary refreshes (0 = no refresh)

parallel_workers.description: Number of parallel workers for bulk processing

resume_from.description: Document ID to resume processing from (for interrupted jobs)
